lane.title: 02 Google Ads
lane.last_task: Explain Google Ads targeting controls for Hamza Hotel late-night setup
lane.last_summary: Explained location mode, Search partners, Display, bidding, and audiences from scratch for the Hamza Express late-night Hamza Hotel campaign. Recommended presence-only, Google Search only, Display off, manual CPC initially, and audiences as observation only because the keyword/location/schedule combination is the real targeting brain for physical footfall.
lane.next_action: Use these settings when applying the live Brand campaign setup after landing proof and ad asset/keyword/schedule mutation path are ready.
lane.mutation_status: No live Google Ads mutation. Explanation and platform guidance only.

recent_events.task: Exact Google Ads platform configuration for Hamza Hotel late-night campaign
recent_events.summary: Verified live Google Ads account/campaign state and current API surface. Brand campaign 23845870050 is enabled, Rs50/day, 5km presence proximity, 0 delivery; Late Night 23854158442 is enabled, Rs300/day, 7km, spending on generic open-now searches. Created exact configuration doc for active Rs500/day Hamza Hotel late-night 5km Search campaign plus paused 2km biryani/ghee-rice fallback, including location, schedule, keywords, negatives, device, audiences, assets, text conveyance, landing CTA, conversion measurement, and kill criteria. Found current live mutation endpoint can change budget/status/bids/negatives but cannot safely apply Brand keywords/RSA/schedule/assets.
recent_events.next_action: Before live money mutation, update/verify /go/google-night landing message/tracking and either add a purpose-built Google Ads endpoint or apply exact Brand campaign setup in Google Ads UI; do not only raise Brand budget to Rs500 without keyword/RSA/schedule/asset readback.
recent_events.mutation_status: No live Google Ads mutation. Local exact configuration spec added under _context only.

recent_events.task: Late-night Hamza Hotel brand-capture ad setup
recent_events.summary: Set local Google Ads lane docs/mockup for late-night Hamza Hotel search capture: Rs 500/day proposed for 5km brand campaign, 2km biryani/ghee-rice fallback kept paused, late-night copy uses Open Till 3 AM, Bangalore's best Ghee Rice/Kabab, 10% dine-in only.
recent_events.next_action: Confirm late-night mockup/copy, verify 10% dine-in proof and landing/site hours, then live-verify Google Ads account before any campaign or budget mutation.

recent_events.task: Add 12 PM lunch Hamza Hotel copy candidate
recent_events.summary: Added Nihaf's proposed lunch copy as a 12 PM candidate in the GBP-verified text asset doc. Flagged that live GBP currently says 2 PM-3 AM, so Open From 12 PM should only go live after GBP/site/landing hours are changed and verified. Recommended RSA headline split: Lunch At Hamza Hotel? / Come To Hamza Express / Open From 12 PM / Wahi Hamza Naam / Naya Zaiqa Naya Andaaz / Ghee Rice & Kabab / 10% Dine-In Offer / 20% Takeaway Offer / Get Directions. Suggested safer description uses Famous Ghee Rice and Kabab unless owner wants the stronger Bangalore's best claim.
recent_events.next_action: Confirm whether real opening is 12 PM or 2 PM; then update GBP/site/landing hours consistently before creating mockup visuals or live ads.

recent_events.task: Correct Hamza Hotel ad positioning from cold messaging to intent conversion
recent_events.summary: Updated text asset doc with positioning correction: Hamza Hotel searchers are warm/high-intent, not cold. Recommended ad frame is recognition -> food/offer -> directions: 'Hamza Hotel search kiya? Hamza Express, HKP Road - Ghee Rice, Kabab, Biryani. 10% dine-in, 20% takeaway. Tap directions.' Reframed Wahi Hamza naam as a trust bridge, not the main sale line. No live Ads/GBP/POS mutation.
recent_events.next_action: Use the intent-conversion frame in mockup visuals after Nihaf confirms opening time and discount proof.

recent_events.task: Add dine-in and takeaway offer copy to Hamza Hotel ad text assets
recent_events.summary: Updated GBP-verified Hamza Hotel text asset doc to include offer messaging: 10% off dine-in and 20% off takeaway across Afternoon/Late Lunch, Dinner, and Late Night variants. Added guardrail that POS/landing proof must be verified before the offer appears in live ads. No Google Ads, GBP, POS, or landing mutation made.
recent_events.next_action: Confirm real opening time and verify discount proof on POS/landing; then create three visual mockups for approval before live campaign creation.

recent_events.task: Verify GBP hours and prepare GBP-aligned Hamza Hotel ad text
recent_events.summary: Live GBP cockpit/API readback shows Hamza Express GBP regular hours already configured as daily 00:00-03:00 plus 14:00-24:00, profile description says Open 2pm to 3am. No GBP hours mutation was needed. Found mismatch remains on hamzaexpress.in homepage/schema, which says 11:00-23:00 / 11AM-11PM, and google-night landing does not visibly say open till 3 AM. Created _context/Google_Ads_Hamza_Brand_2026-05-25/08-gbp-verified-text-assets-for-confirmation.md with GBP-aligned text assets: Afternoon/Late Lunch, Dinner, Late Night; recommends replacing Lunch with Afternoon unless real opening time is earlier than 2 PM.
recent_events.next_action: Get Nihaf confirmation on real opening time and approved wording; then create three ad visual mockups and only after that align site/landing hours before live Ads mutation.

Brand/Legacy campaign 23845870050 is ENABLED at Rs 50/day, already 5km around HE pin, but has 0 impressions/clicks/spend from 2026-05-15 to 2026-05-25. Late Night campaign 23854158442 has 1,678 impressions, 96 clicks, Rs 3,168.82 spend, 0 conversions; spend still dominated by generic open-now restaurant intent. Created text asset doc _context/Google_Ads_Hamza_Brand_2026-05-25/07-hamza-hotel-text-assets-lunch-dinner-late-night.md with lunch/dinner/late-night Hamza Hotel brand-capture RSAs, keywords, negatives, budget split, and fallback 2km variants. Verified public homepage/schema still says 11:00-23:00/11AM-11PM and /go/google-night does not mention open till 3 AM; do not run Open till 3 AM copy live until GBP/site/landing/outlet hours align.
recent_events.next_action: Before creating late-night Hamza Hotel 5km campaign, verify current Brand ad group/keyword/ad approval state or add read endpoint; align hours proof; then create paused campaign with rollback values and enable only after readback.

recent_events.task: Build Hamza Hotel ad visual and five-bucket Google targeting context
recent_events.summary: Created local context pack at _context/Google_Ads_Hamza_Brand_2026-05-25 with a Google mobile search ad visual mockup, five HE bucket docs, and a Google Ads targeting menu. Buckets captured from prior intelligence: Hamza Loyalist/Legacy Memory, Late-Night Heavy Non-Veg, Family Comfort Diner, Fast Parcel/Shop Staff/Office Pickup, and Shivajinagar/HKP Road Food Explorer. Recommended current Rs 500/day test remains Brand/Legacy Hamza Hotel searchers in 2km radius with exact/phrase keywords, lodging negatives, Maps-first landing, and Open till 3 AM only after GBP/site/outlet hours are verified.
recent_events.next_action: If approved for live mutation, verify ad group/ad asset IDs plus GBP/site hours, save rollback values, then change Brand campaign 23845870050 to Rs 500/day and 2km radius with pinned brand bridge copy.

recent_events.summary: Nihaf chose the Brand/Legacy message direction for Hamza Hotel searchers: Searching for Hamza Hotel? Come to Hamza Express on HKP Road. Wahi Hamza Naam, Naya Zaiqa, Naya Andaaz. Best Ghee Rice and Kabab. Recommended making this compact for Google Search visible copy with brand bridge + directions intent.

recent_events.task: Google Ads 2km radius and Hamza Hotel keyword intent audit
recent_events.summary: Read-only keyword-volume audit found Hamza Hotel brand demand is meaningful in Bangalore: hamza hotel avg 6600 monthly searches, Apr 2026 bucket 5400; hamza hotel shivaji nagar avg 590, Apr 880; hamza express avg 110, Apr 590. High-intent food terms include biryani near me open now avg 1900/Apr 1900, kabab near me avg 1300/Apr 1600, late night food near me avg 320/Apr 480, midnight food near me avg 320/Apr 390, non veg restaurant near me open now avg 320/Apr 390. No mutations made.
recent_events.next_action: Use 2km radius for easy-conversion search campaigns; split Hamza Hotel brand capture from late-night non-brand; add lodging/OYO/international negatives before any budget shift.

recent_events.task: Audit Late Night campaign 96-click leak before budget move
recent_events.summary: Read-only deep audit of Late Night campaign 23854158442 before any budget mutation. Live all-period stats: 1,678 impressions, 96 clicks, ₹3,168.82 spend, avg CPC ₹33.01, 0 Google conversions. Click concentration: Open Now Near Me ad group took 81/96 clicks and ₹2,764.50 spend; Biryani/Kabab took 10 clicks/₹292.26; Late Night Bangalore took 4 clicks/₹87.53; Non Veg Halal took 1 click/₹24.54. Top keyword was exact 'restaurants near me open now' with 35 clicks/₹1,178.96 and Quality Score 1/below-average landing + predicted CTR. Top reported search term was 'restaurants nearby' with 21 clicks/₹694.71; reported search terms explain only 39/96 clicks, so Google withholds many query details. Landing proof: /go/google-night is a 200 HTML landing page with buttons, not a direct Maps redirect. /api/google-ads-landing-event shows 66 pageviews, 15 maps clicks, 3 calls, 1 WhatsApp, 1 menu over 30d; therefore only about 15.6% of Google clicks became Maps taps and only 1% became WhatsApp. Root issue: broad generic near-me restaurant demand + non-direct landing funnel, not enough high-intent Maps/dish conversion.
recent_events.next_action: Do not move all budget blindly. Recommended correction before/with budget move: tighten Late Night toward dish/open-now intent, reduce generic near-me spend or force direct directions landing, and add measurement for gclid/source on directions; then reallocate Dinner/Brand budget only after rollback-safe budget readback.
recent_events.mutation_status: read-only audit only; no budget or keyword mutation

Verified account customer 368-171-0084 via hamzaexpress.in API; active Search campaigns are Late Night 23854158442 ₹300/day, Dinner 23855561197 ₹150/day, Brand 23845870050 ₹50/day, all ENABLED/SERVING; PMax 23834053403 remains PAUSED at ₹300/day. 7d cockpit shows ₹2301.14 spend and 70 clicks, almost entirely Late Night; Dinner/Brand enabled but not materially delivering. Campaign criteria show HE pin proximity only: Late Night 7km, Dinner 3km, Brand 5km, PMax 2km; no city LOCATION criteria. Directions proof endpoint live with today's page_view/maps_auto_open events, currently from Meta UTMs rather than Google gclid. No ad mutation performed.
